comment.body:
If spot is above this pivot, it will get a resistance at 6323 - below this spot will be pinned to 6315; above this 6330 will magnetize the spot.
Spot has a chance to squeeze up only during the first 2 hours. 
I code 6353/60 zone as the max (coincidencing with my blowoff top target), shifting up to 6360 after 1.34pm, and before the power hour it can easily get back to 6330 to get pinned. 
During the power hour it should break the 6348.14 line, that also can trap the spot and pin.
